changelog: Fixed the Remote Access QR code going stale after a Reset to Default or golden-image clone: its image URL never changed, so browsers kept showing an old cached QR pointing at the device's previous Tailscale identity. The welcome dashboard is now a managed file (welcome_dashboard.json) so this reaches every existing device on update, not just newly-cloned ones -- the image URL now includes a cache-busting ?v={{ dev_id }} that changes whenever the device re-registers.
warnings: HA will restart automatically to apply the updated Remote Access dashboard. Any manual customization of that specific dashboard will be overwritten (previous version backed up to lovelace.dashboard_welcome.pre_update_backup).
